Dialog.name: MSG_ANTQ_GREET_FIRST_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16801 1586 0}Well, well... You're quite the rare customer. Welcome.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_ANTQ_GREET_FIRST_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems this lady owns the antique shop.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ANTQ_GREET_FIRST_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16813 1586 0}Ah... Officer Kurosawa told me about you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 25 1586}This is but a humble antique shop... Having said that, I believe I can be of some assistance to you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16820 1586 0}You know what a base model is, right? For crafting weapons, I mean.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ANTQ_GREET_FIRST_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}By fusing it with various materials, you can craft special equipment.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}I can help with the crafting process, but you'll have to collect the required materials yourself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16808 1586 0}These base materials can be found in places that tend to be quite... unwelcoming.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}That's why it'll be up to you to collect them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ANTQ_GREET_FIRST_05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16817 1586 0}Also, if you find any gems or the like, I'd be willing to exchange them for some of my wares here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well then, go ahead and have a gander.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ANTQ_GREET_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 3 1001 1586 0}Welcome. Take your time looking around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ANTQ_GREET_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 3 1001 1586 0}Welcome. Make sure you get all your preparations in order.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}I don't want you failing to save the world because you ordered a new weapon too late.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ANTQ_GREET_TALK_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16816 1586 0}Don't you have any gems? I highly suggest you try to find as many as you can.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}I may be the only shop owner who accepts gems as currency.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16823 1586 0}I can detect the true power of a gem, you see.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}Even if others consider them useless rocks, I may still need them. So bring the gems you find to me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ANTQ_GREET_TALK_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16815 1586 0}The cards I carry can be used to strengthen your Personas.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}You can use them to offset Personas' weaknesses or enhance their strengths.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm willing to exchange these cards for gems.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ANTQ_GREET_TALK_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16823 1586 0}Personas are interesting, aren't they?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}Summoning them must be easy for you and your friends... I've never been able to summon one.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}Although, I understand that being able to summon a Persona comes with its own set of difficulties.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ANTQ_GREET_TALK_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16827 1586 0}I wonder what the essence of a Persona truly is...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}I've studied them tirelessly, often only to end up with even more questions...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}I hope I won't be searching for the answers for the rest of my life...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ANTQ_GREET_TALK_05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}Kirijo-san passed away. How's his daughter faring?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Well, we don't need to talk about that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ANTQ_GREET_TALK_06
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16801 1586 0}I can see in your eyes that you're getting stronger. I wonder if that's because of your Personas...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}A great deal of strife is often required to awaken to a Persona, but maybe they're not all bad...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16807 1586 0}Well, fight hard. And if you need anything I can provide, don't hesitate to come.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ANTQ_GREET_TALK_07
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16802 1586 0}Item fusion is kind of like having a good team. Don't you think?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}When you put things together, you might get something more powerful than you ever expected.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you have big ambitions, you've got to keep your teammates close.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ANTQ_GREET_TALK_08
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16801 1586 0}The time has almost come, hm? I can tell.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}How long has it been since you started coming here...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16827 1586 0}To think I'm cooperating with a Persona-user ten years after I stopped working with Kirijo-san...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}But I'm glad that Persona-user is you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16823 1586 0}You had me on tenterhooks with how new you were... But look how capable you are now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQ_AOJIRU_ANTIQUE_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}The {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}? That's quite the rarity you've set your eyes on.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16808 1586 0}Well, that's fine. Bring me the gems and it's yours.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}Mind you, that's one of my more valuable wares, so it'll cost you more than you might be used to.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16823 1586 0}Just let me know whenever you're ready to swap for it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ANTQ_INFO_BASEITEM_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16807 1586 0}So, you found a new base model? Ah, this will make for a fine piece of equipment.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ANTQ_INFO_BASEITEM_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16823 1586 0}Oh, would you look at that? This base model is quite rare.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}I should be able to make a fairly interesting piece of equipment with this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ANTQ_INFO_BASEITEM_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16813 1586 0}Base models don't come any better than this. Seeing one firsthand is practically a spectacle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}Equipment made with this will surely be invaluable. I highly recommend using it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ANTQ_INFO_JEWELRY_SH
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}I heard through the grapevine that the owner there's been collecting gemstones as a hobby.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16824 1586 0}Good grief... What's he even going to do with them? I could get so much more use out of them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1586 0 -1 -1 0 0}Ah, there I go again... Sorry, I don't mean to complain. What can I do for you today?[n]{f 1 1}
